overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Zelda game showing Link walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character travels from a grassy valley along a cliff face, encounters a mounted NPC, and continues into an expansive snow-covered plateau under a starry sky with light snowfall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy valley toward large cliff formation

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the valley wall
evergreen trees with snow on branches visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide grassy valley at night under a starry sky. A massive cliff face looms ahead on the left while snow-covered pine trees dot the right side of the landscape.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to snow as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: walking along the base of the cliff, passing snow-covered pine trees on the right

segments.scene_description: Walking along the cliff base, the path becomes increasingly covered in snow. The cliff face dominates the left side while snow-laden pine trees line the right, creating a more enclosed feeling as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from cliffside to open snow field

events.description: character turns right away from cliff face toward open snow field
mounted NPC on horse appears riding along the snow path

agents.ego_description: turning away from the cliff face toward open snow fields, encountering a mounted rider

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback traveling along the snow path

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the cliff into a more open area, revealing a vast snow field ahead. A mounted NPC on horseback appears riding along the path, and distant snow-covered mountains become visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow across the open mountain plateau under starry sky

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an expansive open snow field with no nearby landmarks. The distant mountain range grows larger as the character approaches, with the landscape consisting entirely of snow-covered ground under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal mountain landscape that transforms from a grassy valley into a vast, frozen plateau. It begins with the character walking through a wide grassy valley under a starry sky, with a massive cliff face looming to the left and scattered pine trees to the right. As the character progresses along the base of the cliff, the terrain becomes increasingly blanketed in snow and the surrounding pine trees create a more enclosed atmosphere. The scene then opens up as the character turns away from the cliff into a wide snow field, passing a mounted NPC on horseback while distant mountains emerge on the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character across an expansive, featureless expanse of snow as the distant mountain range grows larger under the night sky.
